'''Cruiser 8''' was the designation number for an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] during the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]]. It was used as a blind spot as [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] lured a wing of [[Nantex-class territorial defense starfighter/Legends|''Nantex''-class starfighters]] into a volley of missiles fired by [[Red Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Red Squadron]].<ref name="CW10" />

==Appearances==
*{{CW|10}}
